description_long: This office building features a modern, utilitarian design with a concrete and glass facade. The front showcases a large, gridded window section and a prominent sign in what appears to be Chinese characters, suggesting a commercial or business function. The structure has a mix of rectangular and curved architectural elements, with the right side featuring a rounded glass corner and a partial metal framework, possibly for future cladding or as a decorative element. The rear and side elevations are more austere, with minimal window openings and a blocky, modular appearance. The building appears to have at least four stories, with a rooftop section that may serve as a mechanical or utility area. The overall color palette is dominated by shades of gray and beige, with some metallic accents.
description: A modern, multi-story office building with a concrete and glass facade, featuring a prominent sign and a mix of rectangular and curved architectural elements.
description_view_0: The front view displays the main entrance, large gridded windows, signage, and a partially exposed metal framework on the right.
description_view_1: The right side view highlights the curved glass corner, horizontal window bands, and a mostly solid wall with minimal fenestration.
description_view_2: The rear view shows a plain, blocky facade with few windows and a large, flat wall surface.
description_view_3: The left side view reveals a mostly solid wall with a few window openings and the rooftop structure extending backward.
attribute_window_pattern: Horizontal bands of rectangular windows on the front and right sides, with irregular spacing and some large gridded sections; minimal fenestration on the rear and left sides.
